query: SELECT `id`, `userId`, `action`, `resourceType`, `resourceId`, `metadata`, `ipAddress`, `userAgent`, `severity`, `createdAt` FROM `audit_logs` WHERE `audit_logs`.`userId` = 1 ORDER BY `audit_logs`.`createdAt` DESC LIMIT 21;
